# Uha

> The subscription tracker that isn't a subscription. Pay once. No recurring charges, ever. Track all your subscriptions on iOS with renewal alerts, iCloud backup, and a timeline of past and upcoming charges. All data stays on your device. Like a bank feed for your subscriptions.

## Links
- [App Store](https://apps.apple.com/us/app/uha-subscriptions-tracker/id6748603444)
- [TestFlight Beta](https://testflight.apple.com/join/uVYrDkbA)
- [MCP Server](https://uha.app/api/mcp)
- [Security Policy](https://uha.app/security)

## Availability
Uha is available on the App Store. TestFlight remains available for beta testing, and TestFlight purchases are for testing only.

## Pricing
- Free: up to 3 subscriptions, 3 currencies, 3-year timeline
- Unlimited: Unlimited subscriptions, All currencies, iCloud sync, Backup restoration, 12-year timeline, All future premium features
